findings: Launcher contains atomic JSON write helpers/patterns (tmp + replace/os.replace) but also has some direct non-atomic file writes for telemetry/artifacts.
Ledger JSONL is append-only (appropriate) and documented as such.
Commander agent doc requires atomic final bundle writes but does not spell out the exact mechanism (.tmp- then mv/os.replace).
Documented convention says “.tmp- prefix then mv”; implementation often uses “.tmp” plus os.replace (minor convention mismatch, but still atomic).
